(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

item.title: Redmitoto [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: Redmitoto [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: redmitoto-link
item.itunes:summary:
Redmitoto
(Arcade)
Bagi Anda yang gemar bermain slot online atau memasang taruhan togel, menemukan situs yang terpercaya, aman, dan bebas dari gangguan internet positif bisa menjadi tantangan. Namun, kini Anda tidak perlu khawatir lagi! REDMITOTO hadir dengan solusi cerdas yang memudahkan akses tanpa hambatan melalui KATAKUNCI.COM.

[read more]
item.description:
Redmitoto
(Arcade)
Bagi Anda yang gemar bermain slot online atau memasang taruhan togel, menemukan situs yang terpercaya, aman, dan bebas dari gangguan internet positif bisa menjadi tantangan. Namun, kini Anda tidak perlu khawatir lagi! REDMITOTO hadir dengan solusi cerdas yang memudahkan akses tanpa hambatan melalui KATAKUNCI.COM.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Redmitoto
(Arcade)
Bagi Anda yang gemar bermain slot online atau memasang taruhan togel, menemukan situs yang terpercaya, aman, dan bebas dari gangguan internet positif bisa menjadi tantangan. Namun, kini Anda tidak perlu khawatir lagi! REDMITOTO hadir dengan solusi cerdas yang memudahkan akses tanpa hambatan melalui KATAKUNCI.COM.

[read more]

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.description:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

item.title: Mustang Terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Mustang Terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.description:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]

item.title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.description:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]

(Utilities)

item.title: CopyCat [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: CopyCat [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]
item.description:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]

item.title: __my_fzf_history__ for bash [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: __my_fzf_history__ for bash [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: oficsu
item.itunes:summary:
__my_fzf_history__ for bash
(Terminal Apps)
A better alternative to __fzf_history__;
1) make sure you are using Bash;
2) install fzf from your package manager;
3) add `source /path/to/fzf-history.sh` to your ~/.bashrc;
extra 1) it looks better with HISTTIMEFORMAT;
extra 2) and even better with bat util!
[read more]
item.description:
__my_fzf_history__ for bash
(Terminal Apps)
A better alternative to __fzf_history__;
1) make sure you are using Bash;
2) install fzf from your package manager;
3) add `source /path/to/fzf-history.sh` to your ~/.bashrc;
extra 1) it looks better with HISTTIMEFORMAT;
extra 2) and even better with bat util!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
__my_fzf_history__ for bash
(Terminal Apps)
A better alternative to __fzf_history__;
1) make sure you are using Bash;
2) install fzf from your package manager;
3) add `source /path/to/fzf-history.sh` to your ~/.bashrc;
extra 1) it looks better with HISTTIMEFORMAT;
extra 2) and even better with bat util!
[read more]

item.title: Discord [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Discord [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Discord
(Chat & Messenging)
latest and greatest unoffical appimage
you will need qt6 installed

v1.01
new updated appimage removing the need to update anymore



original release was a debian v0.0.65-1
